summary: Completed testing of CoinQuest learning section bug fixes: (1) Progressive unlock for subtopics now working correctly - first subtopic unlocked, subsequent ones locked until previous completed. (2) Fraction displays removed - shows only counts like '2 items' instead of '0/2 items'. Backend tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility (console warning)

seed_data_creation: Created test child user: test_progress_child@test.com for testing progressive unlock
context_for_next_testing_agent: Progressive unlock feature fully tested. Backend returns is_unlocked, is_completed, completed_count, content_count for subtopics and content items. Frontend correctly displays locked/unlocked states and shows counts without fractions.

bug_1_progressive_unlock.description: Subtopics showing locked on quick access bar but ALL unlocked on detail page
bug_1_progressive_unlock.verification: Backend now returns is_unlocked for subtopics in get_topic_detail endpoint. First subtopic is_unlocked=true, subsequent ones depend on previous completion.

bug_2_fraction_removal.description: Remove fraction displays like '2/20 Done' and '0/6'
bug_2_fraction_removal.verification: LearnPage shows '2 Subtopics' and '5 Items' without fractions. TopicPage shows '2 items' instead of '0/2 items'. Quick access badges show just count like '2' instead of '0/2'.
